cases.name: rows-two-blocks
cases.covers: SSG2 with two row blocks + end marker, all column types, nullable columns, varied per-row serverVersion incl. the i64 safe-integer boundary

cases.name: crdt-column
cases.covers: SSG2 for a table with a crdt column (§2.4 tag 8, §5.10): the crdt value rides the bytes machinery (merged bytes, empty, and NULL)

invalid.name: null-bit-on-non-nullable
invalid.covers: Null bitmap bit set for a non-nullable column

invalid.name: missing-end-marker
invalid.covers: Rows segment truncated before the mandatory rowCount = 0 end marker

invalid.name: json-column-not-json
invalid.covers: json column value that does not parse as a JSON document (SPEC.md §2.4 tag 5)
